creator: eugen@freebsd.org
text:
Hi!

I've just tried adding "See Also" link for the PR 236815 discussing a FreeBSD-specific problem in the port devel/glib20 to relevant recent upstream discussion of same problem at https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/glib/issues/1638

But the Bugzilla rejected it with error "is not a valid URL to a bug".

It would be nice also to be allowed to link relevant pull request directly:
https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/glib/merge_requests/574
